prompt: Create a highly detailed isometric miniature diorama of Krakow Main Market Square, Poland at warm golden lunch hour, viewed from above at a three-quarter angle like a handcrafted architectural model on a dark square display base. Show ornate European old-town architecture with pastel townhouses along the back and right edges, red tiled roofs, decorative gables, cobblestone paving, and soft shallow-depth-of-field lighting. The main landmarks should be a long Renaissance cloth hall with arcaded sides and an ornate roofline, plus a large brick Gothic basilica with exactly 2 unequal tall towers, dark spires, onion domes, and gilded details. In the open square include exactly 1 central stone monument with a standing statue, exactly 5 horse-drawn carriages, exactly 6 small market stalls or flower kiosks with pale yellow awnings, and exactly 7 white café umbrellas around outdoor seating. Fill the plaza with many tiny colorful pedestrians in summer clothing, clustered naturally around stalls, cafés, the monument, carriages, and church entrances. Use ultra-detailed tilt-shift miniature, photorealistic 3D render, with warm sunlight, crisp shadows, rich brick and pastel colors, tiny flowers and greenery, and a charming lunch-time tourist atmosphere. Avoid readable signage, modern cars, oversized people, watermarks, or text overlays.
